prompt: I need a C user subroutine for an Adams VFORCE that applies a linear spring: Fx = -500*(DX - 100). The moving marker is 10, ground is marker 1. I need the whole thing - headers, the function, everything so I can compile it into a DLL.
assertions: Uses struct-based C signature (sAdamsVforce* parameter), not Fortran-style flat params with trailing underscore
Includes slv_c_utils.h as the primary SDK header
Includes iflag guard that skips iflag 5, 7, 9
Uses c_sysary or c_sysfnc to query displacement (not a raw function call)
Uses c_errmes for error handling after utility function calls
Parameterizes markers or constants via PAR[] instead of hardcoding marker IDs in the function body
Build command uses correct library name adams_util.lib (not adams_utils.lib)
